COURT NO. 3

The Honourable Mr Justice M. NIRMAL KUMAR

TO BE HEARD THROUGH VIDEO CONFERENCING / HYBRID / PHYSICAL MODE ON TUESDAY THE 7TH DAY OF JANUARY 2025 AT 10:30 A.M.(Regular List) - 5. COURT LINK ALSO AVAILABLE IN https://www.mhc.tn.gov.in/vclink 6. In compromise cases, advocates are required to file the Joint Compromise memo as well as affidavit well in advance before the hearing date and the copy of the same to be served to the public prosecutor for verification of parties and compromise. 7. As per circular in R.O.C.No.111765-A/2024/F1 Dated 04.11.2024 an endorsement by counsel on record that the contents thereof have been read out and explained to the affiant in the language known to the affiant, when the affiant is not signing in English Language in the affidavit. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- I. MONDAY TO FRIDAY - Admission cases and Compromise cases II. MONDAY and TUESDAY - Quash petitions III. WEDNESDAY and THURSDAY - SC/ST Act, General Direction, Not to Harass and Other Crl.op's IV.
